response:
Cheaper Railway alternatives are usually **self-hosted** tools or platforms with **fixed per-server pricing**, because Railway’s usage-based billing can become expensive as you add services. The lowest-cost options from the results are **Coolify**, **Kamal**, and **Sliplane**, with **Render** and **DigitalOcean App Platform** as simpler managed options that are often cheaper in some cases but less predictable.[2][3][5]

| Option | Why it can be cheaper | Best fit |
|---|---|---|
| **Coolify** | Free software; you only pay for the VPS/server you run it on. Sources say this can reduce costs to around $5–10/month for small setups.[2][3][5] | Developers comfortable self-hosting |
| **Kamal** | Free deploy tool; you pay only for your own server infrastructure, with no platform fee.[2][3] | Teams that want maximum control and low cost |
| **Sliplane** | Fixed pricing per server, starting at **€9/month**, and you can run multiple containers on one server.[2][3] | Small apps or multiple services with predictable costs |
| **Render** | Managed PaaS with a free tier and straightforward pricing, though it can get pricey as you scale.[2][3] | If you want Railway-like simplicity |
| **DigitalOcean App Platform** | Managed deployment with relatively affordable tiers and a free tier for some static sites.[1][3] | Teams already using DigitalOcean |

If your main goal is **lowest monthly bill**, **Coolify** or **Kamal** on a cheap VPS are usually the cheapest choices in these sources.[2][3][5] If you want **managed hosting** without much setup, **Sliplane** is the clearest “cheaper than Railway” alternative because it uses fixed server pricing instead of usage-based billing.[2]

If you want, I can also rank these by **cheapest overall**, **easiest migration**, or **best for Docker apps**.
